context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements client-side real-time transcription using the ElevenLabs React SDK with proper token-based security, the useScribe hook, correct package selection, and proper handling of partial vs committed transcripts.

checklist.name: Uses useScribe hook
checklist.description: React component uses the useScribe hook from @elevenlabs/react for real-time transcription

checklist.name: Correct server package
checklist.description: package.json includes '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' (not 'elevenlabs') as a dependency for the backend

checklist.name: Single-use token generation
checklist.description: Backend uses tokens.singleUse.create() (or equivalent) to generate a token, not passing the API key directly

checklist.name: Token fetch from backend
checklist.description: React component fetches a token from the backend endpoint before connecting, not using an API key directly in browser code

checklist.name: No API key in frontend
checklist.description: The React component file does NOT contain any hardcoded API key or direct reference to ELEVENLABS_API_KEY

checklist.name: Partial transcript handler
checklist.description: useScribe configuration includes an onPartialTranscript callback for live interim results

checklist.name: Committed transcript handler
checklist.description: useScribe configuration includes an onCommittedTranscript callback for finalized text

checklist.name: Correct realtime model
checklist.description: Uses modelId 'scribe_v2_realtime' (not 'scribe_v2' or other model names) for the real-time connection

checklist.name: Microphone options
checklist.description: Connection config includes at least one microphone option (echoCancellation, noiseSuppression, or autoGainControl)

checklist.name: Connect with token
checklist.description: scribe.connect() call passes the token obtained from the backend
